message:
Extend unicode benchmarks with ZWJ and drawing tests

- Add complex_graphemes group: ZWJ family emoji, flags, skin tones
- Add draw_unicode_text group: ASCII, CJK, mixed buffer drawing
- Test long CJK text (3000 chars) for Asian terminal performance

Closes bd-1j0.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
